Variables.Name: UTiling
Variables.Description: Controls how much the texture tiles horizontally, by scaling the U component of the vertex UVs by the specified amount.

Variables.Name: VTiling
Variables.Description: Controls how much the texture tiles vertically, by scaling the V component of the vertex UVs by the specified amount.

Variables.Name: UnMirrorU
Variables.Description:
Would like to unmirror U or V 
	   - if the texture is mirrored and if you would like to undo mirroring for this texture sample, use this to unmirror
